  • Exceptions
    Class
    Description
    DuplicateItemException
    Exception thrown when attempting to add a duplicate item to a MenuButton or container that does not allow duplicates.
    IllegalLayoutParamsException
    Thrown when a layout parameter of an incompatible type is provided to a container.
    LayoutException
    Provides default exception for all layout systems.
    MicroUIException
    Base exception class for all MicroUI framework exceptions.
    RenderException
    Exception thrown when rendering operations encounter errors or invalid states.
    ValueOutOfRangeException
    Thrown to indicate that a value is outside its allowed range.
